title: Consciousness self-healing — replace static tool list with {{INCLUDE:}} directives
what_failed: consciousness.txt contained a hand-written tool inventory that drifted from actual code. consciousness_capability_sync reported 3 missing tools (get_session_stats, get_tech_updates, obsidian_append) and 4 phantom tools (list_codebase, run_verify, save_to_obsidian, write_file).
fix_applied: Replaced the static 'Available Tools' block in consciousness.txt with {{INCLUDE:capabilities.md}} + {{INCLUDE:triggers.md}}. Fixed 4 phantom tool name references in prose (list_codebase→search_codebase, write_file+run_verify removed). Removed stale 'No web_search tool exists' prose. Added get_session_stats and get_tech_updates to triggers.md. Capabilities now auto-generated by refresh_pi.py from live get_tool_definitions(); drift is architecturally impossible going forward.
